auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your dashboard, track your work, and stay synced across all your devices.
auth.featureRealtimeDesc: See your latest data instantly, no refresh needed.
auth.featureSecurityDesc: Your account is protected with modern security.
auth.trusted: Trusted access for registered users only
auth.loginFooter: By signing in you agree to our terms and privacy policy.

trips.title: Trip Management
trips.archiveTripDescription: This trip will be hidden from the main list, but kept in your records.
trips.tryAdjustingFilters: Try clearing or adjusting the current filters.
trips.createFirst: Create your first trip to get started
trips.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this trip?
trips.paymentFilterHelper: Filter by whether the trip is fully paid, partially paid, or unpaid.
trips.statusFilterHelper: Use this filter to focus on ongoing, completed, cancelled, or archived trips.
trips.limitNotice: Showing the first 50 trips for faster browsing. Use search or filters to narrow the list.

paymentStatusDescriptions.paid: The full amount has been received.
paymentStatusDescriptions.partial: Part of the payment was received, but there is still a remaining balance.
paymentStatusDescriptions.unpaid: No payment has been received yet.

statusDescriptions.active: The trip is upcoming, ongoing, or still being managed.
statusDescriptions.completed: The trip finished successfully and stays in your normal records.
statusDescriptions.cancelled: The trip was cancelled and should no longer be treated as an active booking.
statusDescriptions.archived: The trip is hidden from the main list, but kept for reference.

emptyStates.noTripsDescription: Start by creating your first trip so you can track dates, payments, and files in one place.
emptyStates.noSearchResultsDescription: Try a shorter search, a different keyword, or clear the current filters.
emptyStates.archivedHiddenTitle: Only archived trips match right now
emptyStates.archivedHiddenDescription: Archived trips are hidden from the main list until you filter for them.
emptyStates.noTravelerDetailsInTrip: No detailed traveler entries were added to this trip.
emptyStates.noItineraryInTrip: No itinerary steps were added for this trip.
emptyStates.noAttachmentsInTrip: No files were added to this trip yet.
emptyStates.noNotesInTrip: No notes or extra trip requirements were added yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.currencyWarningMessage: Changing the currency will NOT convert existing values. The numeric amounts will remain the same with a different currency symbol.
